title: stenocalyx pseudopsidium
intro: Stenocalyx pseudopsidium, also known as the 'false psidium', is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant's extracts are believed to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against certain infections. In traditional medicine, Stenocalyx pseudopsidium is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, it may be used topically or taken internally after proper consultation with a medical professional.
